title: Modern Vibrant Abstract Logo
brief: I’m refreshing my brand identity and need a logo that feels unmistakably modern. Think bright, energetic colours paired with clean, abstract shapes—no literal illustrations or vintage flourishes. The mark should look just as sharp on a website header as it does on packaging or a social profile photo. Here’s how I’d like to tackle it: • Begin with a few quick concept sketches exploring different colour harmonies and abstract forms. • We’ll choose the strongest direction together, then refine it through a couple of focused revision rounds. • Final hand-off should include full-colour and single-colour versions, vector source files (AI or SVG), and high-resolution PNG/JPEG exports, along with a simple style note covering hex/RGB values and any typography used. I’ll share the brand name and background details once we kick off so you can align the design perfectly with the business personality.
